tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Play Dm barred at x57765 and emphasize these notes while strumming - F C D A then play C barred at x35553[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
I'm ten miles from town, and I just broke down[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]C[/ch]                        [ch]Dm[/ch]
Spitting out smoke on the side of the road[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bb[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
I'm out here alone, just trying to get home[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
To tell you I was wrong, but you already know[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]([ch]G[/ch])          [ch]Bb[/ch]
Believe me I won't stop at nothin'[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
  To see you so I've started runnin'[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is love ever after[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
After the life we've been through[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
'Cause I know there's no life after you[/tab]


(The lead guitarist does a little solo, riff thing over top of the following chords):
[ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]Bb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]
   The last time we talked, the night that I walked[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                      [ch]Dm[/ch]
Burns like an iron in the back of my mind[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
I must've been high, to say you and I[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
weren't meant to be an' just wasting my time[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]([ch]G[/ch])         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Oh, why did I ever doubt you[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
  You know, I would die here without you[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is love ever after[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
After the life we've been through[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
'Cause I know there's no life after you[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]Bb[/ch]
You and I, right or wrong, there's no other one[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
After this time spent alone[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Dm[/ch]
It's hard to believe that a man with sight could be so blind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]                                  [ch]F[/ch]                      [ch]C[/ch]
   Thinkin' 'bout the better times, must've been outta my mind[/tab]

So I'm running back to tell you


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
Without you, God knows what I'd do, yeah[/tab]

[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
All that I'm after[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
Is a life full of laughter[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bb[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
As long as I'm laughing with you[/tab]

[tab]                 [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Dm[/ch]
And I think that all that still matters is love ever after[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]Dm[/ch]
After the life we've been through, yeah[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
I know there's no life after you[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
You know there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
No, there's no life after you[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Yeah[/tab]
